videos.headline: Texas holds on for win over Vandy
videos.description: Texas stays in the playoff chase as the Longhorns get a solid win over Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Texas holds on for win over Vandy) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Ryan Wingo scores 75-yard TD on game's 1st play from scrimmage
videos.description: Arch Manning throws it out to Ryan Wingo, who breaks a couple tackles and gets free for a 75-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' Ryan Wingo scores 75-yard TD on game's 1st play from scrimmage) 2025/11/01 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Mason Shipley makes 39-yard field goal) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' defense forces a sack-fumble on Diego Pavia
videos.description: Texas' Colin Simmons drops Diego Pavia and forces a fumble that sets up the Longhorns in Vanderbilt territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' defense forces a sack-fumble on Diego Pavia) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Arch Manning connects with CJ Baxter Jr. for a TD
videos.description: Arch Manning rolls to his right and fires a TD pass to CJ Baxter Jr. to extend Texas' lead over Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' Arch Manning connects with CJ Baxter Jr. for a TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Brock Taylor kicks 44-yard field goal) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Quintrevion Wisner takes a toss into the end zone
videos.description: Quintrevion Wisner gets the toss from Arch Manning and rumbles into the end zone for the Longhorns.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' Quintrevion Wisner takes a toss into the end zone) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Eli Stowers scores a TD right before halftime for Vanderbilt
videos.description: Diego Pavia throws over the middle to Eli Stowers, who breaks a tackle and scores a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Eli Stowers scores a TD right before halftime for Vanderbilt) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning hits a wide-open Emmett Mosley V for his 3rd TD pass
videos.description: Arch Manning finds an open Emmett Mosley V in the end zone to give Texas a 31-10 lead over Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arch Manning hits a wide-open Emmett Mosley V for his 3rd TD pass) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas-Vanderbilt get into a scrum on the Commodores' sideline
videos.description: Xavier Filsaime pushes Diego Pavia into his sideline, which leads to players getting into it.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas-Vanderbilt get into a scrum on the Commodores' sideline) 2025/11/01 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Mason Shipley kicks 37-yard field goal) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vanderbilt's Diego Pavia scores a 25-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Diego Pavia doesn't see anything open downfield and runs for a 25-yard touchdown to cut into Texas' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt's Diego Pavia scores a 25-yard rushing TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vanderbilt's Eli Stowers walks in for his 2nd TD
videos.description: Diego Pavia throws it up to an open Eli Stowers, who walks in for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt's Eli Stowers walks in for his 2nd TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Richie Hoskins hauls in a TD to cut into Texas' TD
videos.description: Diego Pavia hits Richie Hoskins in the end zone to cut into Texas' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Richie Hoskins hauls in a TD to cut into Texas' TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vandy nearly comes up with an onside kick recovery
videos.description: Vanderbilt has multiple opportunities to come up with the ball on an onside kick, but the ball rolls out of bounds.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vandy nearly comes up with an onside kick recovery) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Sarkisian reflects on Manning's performance vs. Vandy
videos.description: Steve Sarkisian recaps QB Arch Manning's performance against the Commodores and says how he's been playing his best ball of the season.
